notes: Updated the hosted Supabase access layer to prefer Supabase Secret API keys (sb_secret_...) instead of legacy JWT-based service_role keys.
Kept legacy service_role_key support as a fallback for older projects while documenting secret_key as the recommended Streamlit secret.
Adjusted Supabase REST headers so Secret API keys are sent as apikey only, while legacy service_role keys retain the Authorization bearer header.
Updated Supabase setup instructions to explicitly enable Row Level Security on the access-control tables.
